titleEn: Privett joins Devenish as swine research manager
titleZh: 普里维特加入德维尼什担任猪营养研究经理
summaryZh: 德维尼什营养公司宣布任命格雷迪·普里维特为猪营养研究经理。普里维特在阿肯色州东北部农场长大，拥有堪萨斯州立大学猪营养硕士学位，研究涵盖母猪和保育猪营养、生物标志物关系及商业猪生产系统。他将负责监督和协调公司所有猪研究项目，推动以科学为基础的解决方案。
translationZh:
德维尼什营养公司很高兴欢迎格雷迪·普里维特加入团队，他在农业领域的深厚根基以及猪营养方面的专业专长为团队带来了宝贵的研究领导力。

普里维特在阿肯色州东北部长大，在家族的大田作物和养牛场工作首次点燃了他对农业的热情。这一基础促使他在欧扎克斯学院攻读动物科学和农学学士学位，期间他还在学院的猪研究设施获得了实践经验，并完成了行业实习，加深了他对猪营养和生产的兴趣。

为了进一步扩展知识，普里维特在堪萨斯州立大学获得了猪营养硕士学位。他的研究生研究涵盖了母猪和保育猪营养、生物标志物关系以及商业猪生产系统，为应用研究和实际生产环境奠定了坚实基础。

作为猪营养研究经理，普里维特将主要负责监督和协调德维尼什过去、现在和未来所有猪研究项目的各个方面。他的应用研究背景和对商业生产系统的第一手了解，使他能够很好地推进德维尼什致力于以科学为基础的解决方案，为生产者带来实际成果。普里维特将常驻明尼苏达州费尔蒙特的德维尼什公司总部。
featuredReason: 该新闻主要涉及传统猪营养研究岗位任命，与智慧畜牧（IoT/AI/自动化/机器人/传感器）的核心技术关联度极低，但可作为行业人才动态参考。
contentFull: Hog NutritionFeedFarming Business ManagementNewsPrivett joins Devenish as swine research managerHis graduate research spanned sow and nursery pig nutrition, biomarker relationships and commercial swine production systems.Industry ReleaseJune 18, 2026schedule1 Min ReadDevenishDevenish Nutrition is pleased to welcome Grady Privett, whose deep roots in agriculture and specialized expertise in swine nutrition bring valuable research leadership to the team.Privett grew up in northeast Arkansas, where working on his family’s row crop and cattle operation first ignited his passion for agriculture. That foundation led him to pursue a B..S in animal science and agronomy from College of the Ozarks, where he also gained hands-on experience at the college’s swine research facility and completed industry internships that deepened his interest in swine nutrition and production.Driven to expand that knowledge further, Privett went on to earn his M.S. in swine nutrition from Kansas State University. His graduate research spanned sow and nursery pig nutrition, biomarker relationships and commercial swine production systems; building a strong foundation in both applied research and real-world production environments. Related:Alltech introduces Olerix for use in pork productionIn his role as swine research manager, Privett will hold primary responsibility for the supervision and coordination of all aspects of Devenish’s past, current and future swine research projects. His applied research background and firsthand understanding of commercial production systems position him well to advance Devenish’s commitment to science-led solutions that deliver real results for producers. Privett will be based at Devenish Corporate Headquarters in Fairmont, Minnesota.About the AuthorIndustry ReleaseSee more from Industry Releasechevron_rightSubscribe to Our NewslettersNational Hog
